name: Gulaschsuppe (Goulash Soup)
recipeInstructions:
Beef Broth can be either canned or homemade (homemade is preferred.)
1. Fry onions in hot fat until transparent.
2. Add green peppers and tomato paste. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add lean beef cubes and remaining ingredients. Simmer for about 1 1/2 hours, until meat is tender.
- If you like, add cubed potatoes and simmer until they are done.
4. Best when reheated and served the second day.
